title: calamintha nepeta subsp. glandulosa
intro: Calamintha nepeta subsp. glandulosa, commonly known as glandular lesser calamint, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Calamintha nepeta subsp. glandulosa include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and providing pain relief. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking and as a natural remedy for various health problems.
